text.message: dno why you force me to take the 3:1 black

think black will only move it on the 8 yeah
And if he has multiple knights he doesn’t have to get ahead on the army race yet
You should block the 6 instead no?
Was waiting for you to play the knight and then I would have said yes
why? to early in the game
For the exact reason that you played road builder, you would have had a settle.  I didn’t want to give it up for a future nb.  Only would have done it if you played a knight then
I want it off the 4, future nb doesn’t help me.  Will do for a nb now and move
Sorry blue and oj, wouldn’t agree to it if I wasn’t only holding brick at the time lol
i know u only had brick
how did blue buy so many devs with no shp lol
red just gonna chill with road :D
can't trade you 2 for 1 blue in your position lol
dno about feeding red city tbh

lol I am so far behind without devs it really doesn’t matter

ya, I am not in the lead here :D
